title: Integrated Intermediate Modeling Capstone · Cumulative Modeling Board
summary: Unfamiliar scientific, civic, financial, operational, and data cases requiring model construction, calculation, code, critique, and transfer. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Turn stakeholder needs into answerable model questions, quantities, constraints, and validation criteria.
Validate a model against held-out cases, limits, units, and stakeholder behavior.
Solve and graph compound and two-variable inequality systems as feasible regions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.
